shape: irregular - roughly rectangular lot with angled landscaped islands subdividing the gravel field
entrance: from the road/driveway on the right side near the picnic shelter, connecting to the paved sidewalk loop
landmarks: curb islands with shrubs and boulders
notes: Real shape is a wide shallow gravel lot bordered by a wood rail fence at the rear (north) and a concrete sidewalk/curb on the right (east) leading to a picnic shelter. Multiple landscaped islands (boulders, lavender/sage shrubs, single trees) break up the parking field rather than a clean grid. Parking stalls are marked by short wheel-stop curbs and run in shallow rows facing the fence/view. The camera is mounted high on the south/near corner; nearest corner is front-right where the Subaru Outback and Forester park. Lot slopes gently down toward the open green space and housing development to the north. Stalls are mostly perpendicular pull-in against curb stops, not parallel.
